datasetAgreementGeneral: This LSTM-based readmission prediction model is developed for predicting hospital readmissions in diabetic patient populations. Access is restricted to qualified medical researchers operating under HIPAA-compliant institutional frameworks.
term1: You acknowledge that this model is designed exclusively for hospital readmission prediction research and must not be applied to clinical decisions without appropriate validation.
term2: You agree that all usage will comply with HIPAA and all applicable patient data protection regulations.
term3: You are required to provide proper attribution to the model developers in all publications and presentations.
term4: You accept that all outcomes are solely at your discretion and the developers disclaim any liability.
term5: You agree to share any improvements or modifications with the original developers.
term6: You agree not to redistribute this model to third parties without explicit written permission.
